mcp.mapping: Claude MCP server definitions to Codex [mcp_servers.*] tables

permissions.mapping: Claude permissions to Codex sandbox, rules/*.rules prefix_rule, and MCP tool approvals

nativeTargets.WebFetch/WebSearch/Agent: config.toml approval_policy = on-request plus managed metadata

hooks.mapping: Claude command hooks to Codex native hook TOML; unsupported handlers remain metadata

commands.mapping: Claude slash commands may become Codex skills or plugin commands; conversion remains manual-review until the target command schema is confirmed
